[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111110000 5
1 0101000100 3
2 1110010101 6
3 0111011110 7
4 0110001100 4
5 0011111000 5
6 0101000100 3
7 1110010101 6

01 10 0011100101 5
12 21 0011110000 4
23 32 0101000000 2
34 43 0100000100 2
45 54 1000010001 3
56 65 0000110001 3
67 76 0100001000 2
70 07 0100001000 2

02 20 0111100000 4
13 31 0001000100 2
24 42 0110010000 3
35 53 0000000000 a
46 64 0100010001 3
57 75 0000000000 a
60 06 0101101001 5
71 17 0000000000 a

03 30 0101000100 3 match 1 6
14 41 0010010101 4
25 52 0000110000 2
36 63 0101000000 2
47 74 0100000000 1
50 05 1000100001 3
61 16 0001110001 4
72 27 0100000000 1

04 40 1110000101 5
15 51 0000110001 3
26 62 0101110000 4
37 73 0100000000 1
